message:
feat(resize): add resize crash forensics module with crash bundle integration (wa-1u90p.6.4)

- New resize_crash_forensics module: process-global ResizeCrashContext singleton
  with OnceLock<RwLock<Option<T>>> pattern for structured crash diagnostics
- ResizeCrashContextBuilder with consuming-self fluent API for gate state,
  queue depths, in-flight transactions, policy decisions, storm state,
  and domain budget entries
- Bounded policy decision buffer (MAX_POLICY_DECISIONS = 64)
- Integrate resize forensics into crash bundles: write_crash_bundle accepts
  optional ResizeCrashContext, writes resize_forensics.json to bundle
- Update CrashManifest with has_resize_forensics field
- Update all write_crash_bundle callers in incident_bundle_tests and proptest_crash
- 13 unit tests covering global state, builder, serialization, bounding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
